use_codes.desc: A METHOD OF TREATMENT OF A CONDITION INVOLVING AN ANTIBODY ANTIGEN REACTION

indications.text:
ALOCRIL® ophthalmic solution is indicated for the treatment of itching associated with allergic
conjunctivitis.
This label may not be the latest approved by FDA.
For current labeling information, please visit https://www.fda.gov/drugsatfda
